fog_low_cloud_proxy.note: Proxy only; AWOS hourly visibility/cloud-base history is sparse in the current archive.

bullets: Rain is observed in 3.4% of hourly records, with the highest rain frequency near 17 WITA.
The composite convective window is 15-20 WITA, combining rain frequency and gust occurrence.
Peak gust occurrence is near 00 WITA.
Sea-breeze signal confidence is high with day/night direction separation of 104.2 degrees.

monthly_v_dry.note: AWOS hourly files do not include populated visibility; using 9999 m fallback.
